# ToolkitFree

> Free browser-based image utilities. File contents are processed locally and are not uploaded for processing.

## Capability notes

- Guaranteed converter inputs and outputs: JPG/JPEG, PNG, WebP.
- Browser-dependent converter inputs: GIF, BMP, SVG. GIF conversion exports one static frame.
- Not currently supported: HEIC input, TIFF input, GIF output.
- Large files and batches are limited by device memory, browser decoders, and Canvas dimensions.
- Quality compression may not produce a smaller file; when no smaller same-dimension result exists, the original is kept. Target mode verifies the actual output size and reports whether the selected maximum was met.
- Batch processing is available in Converter, Compressor, Resizer, and Image to PDF. Cropper, Favicon Generator, and Background Remover process one image at a time.
- Converter batches keep successful outputs when individual files fail and de-duplicate output filenames.
- File contents stay on the device. The site still requests normal site assets and advertising resources. Background Remover also downloads model files.

## Main tools

- [Image Converter](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter): Convert JPG, PNG, and WebP. Batch supported.
- [Image Compressor](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-compressor): Use quality/dimension controls or a verified target-size mode for JPG, PNG, and WebP.
- [Compress Image to 100KB](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-compressor/compress-to-100kb): Defaults to a bounded 100KB target search and labels every result as met or not met.
- [Image Resizer](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-resizer): Platform variants start with verified exact presets; custom ratio mode fits each image inside shared maximum dimensions.
- [Image Cropper](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-cropper): Crop one JPG, PNG, or WebP with bounded mouse/touch controls and Free, 1:1, 16:9, 4:3, 3:2, or 9:16 ratios.
- [Image to PDF](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-to-pdf): Combine supported images into a multi-page PDF.
- [Favicon Generator](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/favicon-generator): Generate favicon assets from one image.
- [Background Remover](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/background-remover): Remove one image background with a downloaded browser model.
- [QR Generator](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/qr-generator): Generate PNG or SVG QR codes.

## Supported converter pages

- [JPG to PNG](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/jpg-to-png)
- [PNG to JPG](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/png-to-jpg)
- [WebP to JPG](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/webp-to-jpg)
- [JPG to WebP](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/jpg-to-webp)
- [PNG to WebP](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/png-to-webp)
- [WebP to PNG](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/webp-to-png)

- [Image Format Comparison](https://toolkitfree.net/guides/image-format-comparison)
- [Reduce Image Size](https://toolkitfree.net/guides/reduce-image-size)
- [Privacy Policy](https://toolkitfree.net/privacy-policy)
- [About](https://toolkitfree.net/about)
